name: Virtual World Hime - Nyannyan
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>電</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>でん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>脳</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>のう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>堺</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>姫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>娘</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ニャン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>々</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ニャン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If a Level 3 monster(s) is Normal or Special Summoned to your field while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card as a Tuner, but banish it when it leaves the field, also for the rest of this turn, you can only Special Summon Level/Rank 3 or higher monsters. If this card is banished: You can target 1 of your other banished cards; shuffle it into the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Virtual World Hime - Nyannyan" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If a Level 3 monster(s) is Normal or Special Summoned to your field while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card as a Tuner, but banish it when it leaves the field, also for the rest of this turn, you can only Special Summon Level/Rank 3 or higher monsters. If this card is banished: You can target 1 of your other banished cards; shuffle it into the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Virtual World Hime - Nyannyan" once per turn.
eff: If a Level 3 monster(s) is Normal or Special Summoned to your field while this card is in your GY (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card as a Tuner, but banish it when it leaves the field, also for the rest of this turn, you can only Special Summon Level/Rank 3 or higher monsters. If this card is banished: You can target 1 of your other banished cards; shuffle it into the Deck. You can only use each effect of "Virtual World Hime - Nyannyan" once per turn.

action: Returns the player's banished cards to the Deck by effect
Returns the player's banished cards to the Extra Deck
stat_change: Treats itself as a Tuner monster
summoning: Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Level specific monsters
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Rank specific monsters
banished: Banishes itself when it leaves the field
